Patch

portlint: OK (looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 12.1-RELEASE, amd64, default options tested)

Additionally changed GitHub repo download to release tarball (also on GitHub).

From Changelog (https://github.com/Normaliz/Normaliz/blob/master/CHANGELOG):

* Improvements in finding dependencies
* Addition of IsEmptySemiopen and CoveringFace
* Source file structure changed
* Input in libnormaliz
* Tests for installation in SageMath
